tool_access.name: web_search
tool_access.description: Searches the public web using a search API.

tool_access.name: read_url
tool_access.description: Fetches and parses the text content of a given URL.

tool_access.name: write_output_file
tool_access.description: Writes the final research summary to a designated output folder.

known_risks.risk: May retrieve inaccurate or outdated information from public web sources.
known_risks.mitigation: Outputs are labeled as unverified research. Human review required before any business use.

known_risks.risk: Could follow redirect chains to untrusted domains if the initial domain is compromised.
known_risks.mitigation: Blocked domains list is maintained and updated regularly.
